_meta.author: muditgoel1512
_meta.title: Sign In
_meta.description: The Jobsly sign-in interface combines functionality with visual appeal through its split-panel design. On the left, a visually engaging collage displays professional images alongside key recruitment statistics . On the right, a clean and intuitive sign-in form provides email and password fields with thoughtful touches like password visibility control. The interface features a prominent theme toggle that seamlessly transitions between light and dark modes, accompanied by smooth reveal animations that enhance the user experience. Additionally, the interface offers alternative sign-in options through Google, along with convenient links for password recovery and new account registration, all wrapped in a responsive design that adapts gracefully to different screen sizes.
